details: The agent successfully listed releases for openclaw/openclaw, retrieved the specific release tagged v2026.3.13-1 using the get_release_by_tag tool, and correctly reported all three first items from What's Changed: 'fix(compaction): use full-session token count for post-compaction sanity check' by @efe-arv, 'fix(telegram): thread media transport policy into SSRF' by @obviyus, and 'fix: handle Discord gateway metadata fetch failures' by @jalehman. All three match the known facts exactly.
